title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v0.60.0

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.60.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.60.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.59.2...v0.60.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/image v5.31.0, c/storage v1.54.0, c/common to v0.59.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2011](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/2011)

-   Fix spelling mistake by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2019](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/2019)
-   \[skip-ci] Packit/RPM: more fixes by [@​lsm5](https://togithub.com/lsm5) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2015](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/2015)
-   libnetwork: fix rexec env check for rootlessnetns by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2020](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/2020)
-   libimage/manifests.list.Add(): preserve artifactType when all=true by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2021](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/2021)
